prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed image of a {argument name="car description" default="blue Alpine A110 R sports car with a black hood"} parked in the foreground inside a large, spacious aircraft hangar. Directly behind the car is a {argument name="airplane description" default="white Airbus A320 commercial airplane"} with "AIRBUS A320" painted on its fuselage and a blue tail. The car features black alloy wheels and a front license plate reading "{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}". The hangar has a smooth, glossy concrete floor that clearly reflects both vehicles. On the left wall, a large sign reads "{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}". The massive hangar doors are open in the background, revealing a bright, cloudy sky and a distant tarmac. Cinematic lighting, sharp focus, automotive photography style.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级、高细节的图像，展示了一辆 {argument name="car description" default="带有黑色引擎盖的蓝色 Alpine A110 R 跑车"} 停在宽敞大型飞机机库内的前景中。汽车正后方是一架 {argument name="airplane description" default="白色的 Airbus A320 商用客机"}，机身上印有“AIRBUS A320”字样，尾翼为蓝色。汽车配有黑色合金轮毂，前车牌上写着“{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}”。机库地面为光滑的亮面混凝土，清晰地反射出两辆载具。左侧墙上挂着一块大牌子，上面写着“{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}”。背景中巨大的机库门敞开，露出明亮多云的天空和远处的停机坪。电影级光影，焦点清晰，汽车摄影风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 机库中的跑车与客机：生成一张停在维修机库内、商用客机前方的跑车照片级图像。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
